S T . W . f a . 322(3T) fTlft^- 3-5-1984 3. sr.'w.fa'. 863(3r) g-Rtg- 22-11-198.5 4. *rr.^r.ft\ 70o(ar) ?rr??fa 15-6-1988 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE .New Delhi, the 3rd November, 1<JH8 NOTIFICATION G.S.R. 1057(E) .—Whereas the Central Government h now satisfied that long terms use of steroids in fixed dose combinations drugs for treat' ment of asthma is likely to involve risk to human beings' and such formu- lations do not have therapeutic justification : And whereas the Central Government is now also satisfied thai fixed dose combinations of chloramphenicol for internal use is likely to involve risk to human beings : And, whereas the. Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and t-xpedient in public interest to prohibit the manufacture and sale of (he drugs aforesaid. -- 2 of 4 -- [*rp>T ll—wro 3(i)l WKT m Trw?f: wgrtfrw 3 Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by t>eetion 2uA of the Drugs 8c Cosmetics Art, 1940 (23 of 1940) liie Central Government hereby makes the iollowing further amendments in the notification of the Govern- ment or India, in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. GS.K. 578 (E), dated 23rd of July, 1983 namely : - Ju tire Tabic under the said notification for items 14 and 15 the follow- ing items shall be substituted namely :~ "11. Fixed dose combination of corticosteroids with any other drug for internal use. 15. Fi\ed dose combinations of Chloramphenicol with any other drug for internal use." [No. X-I KH4 2|K8 OMS&PFA] SMT.
